description: Ablation study on migration frequency between islands

results.notes: Frequent migration - islands converge too quickly, reduced exploration
Default interval - good balance of information sharing and diversity
Infrequent migration - high diversity but slower convergence

conclusion: Migration interval of 10 generations provides optimal balance. Too frequent migration causes premature convergence; too infrequent slows information sharing.
recommendation: Migration interval = 10 is optimal for 20-generation runs. Scale proportionally for longer runs.
